fragments.summary: Keep Athena retrieval deterministic and inspectable.
fragments.full_text: Keep Athena retrieval deterministic and inspectable. Stable ranking and visible reasoning help debugging.

fragments.summary: Do not skip feedback when changing memory selection.
fragments.full_text: Do not skip feedback when changing memory selection. Retrieval changes should still be judged explicitly.

fragments.summary: Validate state before commit or merge.
fragments.full_text: Validate state before commit or merge. Check persisted state and retrieval outputs before closing work.

fragments.summary: Design docs often help orient architecture work.
fragments.full_text: Design docs often help orient architecture work. They can reduce guessing during implementation.

fragments.summary: Viewer refresh should stay fast under repeated polling.
fragments.full_text: Viewer refresh should stay fast under repeated polling. Operators should not wait long for repeated inspection.

fragments.summary: Internal tools should show status clearly.
fragments.full_text: Internal tools should show status clearly. Freshness and failure state should be visible to operators.

fragments.summary: Separate current working set from larger store when useful.
fragments.full_text: Separate current working set from larger store when useful. Users may confuse packet and total memory otherwise.

fragments.summary: Tests can reveal current behavior quickly.
fragments.full_text: Tests can reveal current behavior quickly. They may help orient debugging even when they are not canonical.

fragments.summary: Cached responses can reduce refresh cost.
fragments.full_text: Cached responses can reduce refresh cost. Repeated read paths sometimes benefit from a cache.

fragments.summary: Use durable state as source of truth for runtime memory.
fragments.full_text: Use durable state as source of truth for runtime memory. Runtime state should not drift from persisted state.

fragments.summary: Weak memory inventory can hide retrieval quality.
fragments.full_text: Weak memory inventory can hide retrieval quality. Bad corpus quality can look like bad ranking.

fragments.summary: Long operations should have explicit stop rules.
fragments.full_text: Long operations should have explicit stop rules. Expensive work should not start from vague orientation.
